kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan with the Awl's levy is immediately below Beatrix.
Edmund's levy is between the Tanner and the artisan in Southgate.
Mason goes with exactly two of Beatrix, Loom, Boots, and Kingsford.
The artisan with the Loom's levy is lower than both the Fletcher and the artisan in Highrow.
9 coins goes with at most two of Fletcher, Hammer, Rope, and Southgate.
The artisan with 5 coins and the Fletcher are in the same ward.
At least one member of the Clothiers' Guild is in the Market Ward.
Rowan's levy is at least 3 coins more than the artisan in Bridgegate.
The artisan who makes Horseshoes' levy is higher than both the artisan with the Awl and the artisan in Bridgegate.
The artisan in Highrow's levy is immediately below the artisan who makes Candles.
The artisan with the Hammer's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the Tanner.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: The angler using the Crankbait's weight is immediately below Dale.
Gus' weight is between the angler who landed the Perch and the angler at Willowmere.

15 lb goes with at most two of Catfish, Spinnerbait, Shrimp, and Willowmere.
The catch with 11 lb and the angler who landed the Catfish are in the same watershed.
